name: Vasantrao Deshpande
description: '''Vasantrao Deshpande''' (2 May 1920 – 30 July 1983) {{Pronunciation|Vasantrao_Deshpande.wav}} was a [[Hindustani classical]] vocalist renowned for his contribution to [[Sangeet Natak]]. Deshpande notably starred in [[Purushottam Darvhekar]]'s  popular play [[Katyar Kaljat Ghusali (play)|Katyar Kaljat Ghusli]].
